questionHtml: State two structural features that differ between RNA and DNA.
markschemeHtml:
a. number of strands
OR
(usually) only one strand in RNA/two strands in DNA 

b. base composition
OR
uracil only in RNA / thymine only in DNA 

c. type of pentose
OR
ribose only in RNA / deoxyribose only in DNA

meta.title: State two structural features that differ between RNA and DNA.
